{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2464556?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/homanp", "id": 2464556, "login": "homanp", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI0NjQ1NTY=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/homanp", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Summary
 
`GET /v1/contributors/:login/profile` and the `gittensory_get_contributor_profile` MCP tool skip the contributor-scoped access check that every sibling endpoint enforces. Any authenticated session/API/MCP token holder can read any contributor's profile; for confirmed Gittensor miners that exposes `alphaPerDay`, `taoPerDay`, `usdPerDay` (and the `hotkey` on the REST path). Authenticated cross-contributor disclosure, CWE-284 / IDOR.
 
### Details
 
In `src/api/routes.ts` the profile handler returns `buildContributorProfile(...)` with no `requireContributorAccess` call. Every sibling (`/decision-pack`, `/repos/:owner/:repo/decision`, etc.) gates and 403s on a cross-contributor request — the profile route is the only omission. `buildContributorProfile` (`src/signals/engine.ts`) embeds `hotkey` and the three `*PerDay` fields for any confirmed miner.
 
The MCP tool `getContributorProfile` (`src/mcp/server.ts`) also omits `requireContributorAccess`. Its `redactSensitiveForMcp` filter only strips keys matching `hotkey|coldkey|wallet|private_key|privateKey|mnemonic`, so the hotkey is dropped but `alphaPerDay`/`taoPerDay`/`usdPerDay` pass through.
 
The codebase treats these as secret everywhere else — `decision-pack.ts` destructures the hotkey out before serving, and three sanitizers scrub hotkey/wallet from AI/comment output — which is why this is an oversight, not by-design.
 
Exposure: REST → hotkey + 3 financial fields; MCP → 3 financial fields (hotkey redacted).
 
### PoC
 
1. Get any valid session/API/MCP token.
2. Pick a target `login` that is a confirmed miner.
3. `GET /v1/contributors/{target}/profile` → 200 with `gittensor.hotkey`, `alphaPerDay`, `taoPerDay`, `usdPerDay`.
4. `GET /v1/contributors/{target}/decision-pack` (same token) → 403, proving the missing gate.
5. MCP `gittensory_get_contributor_profile` with `{target}` → result includes the three `*PerDay` fields.
### Impact
 
Any token holder can enumerate other miners' daily TAO/alpha/USD revenue (plus hotkey via REST) without authorization. All miners with snapshot data are affected.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/JSONbored/gittensory/security/advisories/GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5", "https://github.com/JSONbored/gittensory/commit/811ef5fb9d748170011f8854d88c64627ad666a0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/JSONbored/loopover/security-advisories/GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/JSONbored/gittensory", "summary": "Gittensory: Missing contributor-scoped access control on profile endpoint and MCP tool leaks miner financial data", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-382c-vx95-w3p5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@jsonbored/gittensory-mcp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gittensory: Missing contributor-scoped access control on profile endpoint and MCP tool leaks miner financial data
